sources.title: Greater Mapungubwe Heritage Site and Tour

slides.heading: Mapungubwe: Mfumo wa Xintu wa Khale eAfrika
slides.lead: Kwalomu ka malembe ya 800 lama hundzeke, mfumo wo sungula lowukulu wa le Afrika-Dzonga wu fumile hi ku xavisa nsuku ni marhomu ya ndlopfu - laha kwala tikweni ra hina.

image.alt: Xitsunga xa ntshava wa ribye ra sandsitoni lexi nga na nhloko yo ola lexi voninga hi ntima wa nsuku ehansi ka dyambu ra Afrika, na nambu ehansi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='250' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 120 h320 v60 h-320 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M70 120 q10 -46 74 -46 q64 0 74 46 Z' fill='#c8934a'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='72' height='10' fill='#a8762f'/><path d='M0 150 q80 -14 160 0 q80 14 160 0 v30 h-320 Z' fill='#6a86a8'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sungula hi ku vutisa swichudeni leswi va swi tivaka hi mimfumo ya le Afrika loko va Yuropa va nga si fika. Veka mhaka ya nkoka eku sunguleni: khale ka lembe ra 1652, vanhu va le Afrika-Dzonga va akile mfumo wo fuwa, lowu hlelekeke kahle lowu a wu xavisa ni matiko ya kule. 'Mapungubwe' hakanyingi va ku wu vula 'ntshava wa phungubye'. Namuntlha wu le Xifundzeni xa Limpopo.

slides.heading: Mfumo laha matiko manharhu ma hlanganaka kona
slides.lead: Mapungubwe wu kurile eNkoveni wa Limpopo kwalomu ka malembe ya 900 lama hundzeke.

blocks.text: Mapungubwe wu le n'walungwini wa **Xifundzeni xa Limpopo**, ekusuhi ni laha **milambu ya Limpopo na Shashe** yi hlanganaka kona. Laha hi kona na Afrika-Dzonga, Zimbabwe na Botswana ma khumbanaka namuntlha.

items: Vanhu va sungule ku aka laha eku sunguleni ka va-1100 (kwalomu ka malembe ya 900 lama hundzeke).
Mfumo a wu fuwe naswona wu tiye ngopfu ku sukela kwalomu ka 1220 ku ya eka 1300.
A wu ri mfumo wo sungula wa le Afrika-Dzonga - ndhawu leyi a yi fumiwa hi hosi.

image.alt: Mepe yo olova leyi kombaka milambu mimbirhi yi hlangana, na ntshava lowu funghiweke laha yi hlanganaka kona.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 40 q60 30 96 70 q30 30 100 42' fill='none' stroke='#6a86a8' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M60 20 q30 40 56 90' fill='none' stroke='#6a86a8' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M104 96 q10 -18 26 -18 q16 0 26 18 Z' fill='#c8934a'/><circle cx='130' cy='96' r='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><text x='138' y='94' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#333'>Mapungubwe</text></svg>

slides.notes: Komba ndhawu eka mepe wa Afrika-Dzonga wa tlilasi - le n'walungwini swinene, ekusuhi ni Musina (Messina). Milambu yi ri ya nkoka hikuva yi nyike mati ya vanhu, swirimiwa ni tihomu endhawini leyi omeke. Kandziyisa nkarhi eka swichudeni: 'kwalomu ka malembe ya 900 lama hundzeke' i kwalomu ka vakokwana va 30 endzhaku.

slides.heading: Doroba ehenhla ka ntshava
slides.lead: Loko mfumo wu ri karhi wu kula, vanhu va nkoka swinene va rhurhile va ya ehenhla ka ntshava wo leha, lowu nga na nhloko yo ola.

blocks.text: Eku sunguleni vanhu a va tshama emisaveni yo ola ehansi. Loko Mapungubwe wu fuwa naswona wu tala hi vanhu, **hosi ni ndyangu wa vuhosi va rhurhile va ya ehenhla ka ntshava**, kasi vanhu vo tala a va tshama emisaveni yo ola ehansi. Vatirhi va tlhele va rhwala misava yo tala va tlhandluka ntshava wo leha ku endla mintanga ni maandzelo.

items: Ntshava wu na matlhelo yo leha naswona ku na tindlela to koma ntsena to ya ehenhla.
Ku tshama ehenhla swi kombise leswaku hosi a yi ri na matimba naswona a yi hlawulekile.
Vanhu va magidi va tshamile edorobeni na ekusuhi na rona hi nkarhi lowu a wu tala swinene.

image.alt: Ntshava wo leha lowu nga na nhloko yo ola na tindlwana leti rhendzelekaka ehenhla, na tindlwana to tala emisaveni yo ola ehansi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M70 120 q6 -60 50 -60 q44 0 50 60 Z' fill='#c8934a'/><rect x='86' y='58' width='68' height='6' fill='#a8762f'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='104' cy='52' r='7'/><circle cx='120' cy='50' r='7'/><circle cx='136' cy='52' r='7'/></g><g fill='#8a6a44'><circle cx='30' cy='132' r='8'/><circle cx='52' cy='136' r='8'/><circle cx='190' cy='134' r='8'/><circle cx='212' cy='130' r='8'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Leyi i mbilu ya ntsheketelo wa xivumbeko xa vanhu naswona yi ta vuya endzhaku. Ku rhurha ku ya ehenhla ka ntshava a ku ri ku cinca lokukulu: ro sungula endhawini leyi, varhangeri va tshamile va hambanile va tlhela va tlakuka ehenhla ka vanhu ntsena. Hlamusela 'ndyangu wa vuhosi' hi ku olova - hosi ni maxaka ya yona. Misava leyi rhwariweke yi komba vutirhi lebyikulu lebyi vanhu va byi endleke ku xixima hosi.

slides.eyebrow: Ndlela leyi vanhu a va hanya ha yona
slides.heading: Varimi, varisi ni vaxavisi
slides.lead: Rifuwo ra Mapungubwe ri sungurile hi swakudya ni tihomu, ku nga ri nsuku ntsena.

blocks.heading: Vurimi
blocks.text: Vanhu a va rima swirimiwa swo fana na mabele ni mavele naswona va hlayisa mbewu leyi seleke ya minkarhi yo tika.

blocks.heading: Tihomu
blocks.text: Mintlhambi ya tihomu a yi ri xikombiso xa rifuwo naswona a yi tirhisiwa ku komba leswaku ndyangu wu fuwe njhani.

blocks.heading: Vutshila
blocks.text: Vatirhi lava nga na vutshila a va endla swibya, nguvu, switirhisiwa swa nsimbhi ni swilo swo saseka swa nsuku.

slides.notes: Lulamisa ku pfumala ku twisisa loku talaka: mfumo a wu nga fuwanga hi nsuku ntsena. Vurimi lebyinene ni mintlhambi leyikulu ya tihomu swi nyike vanhu swakudya swo ringana ni nkarhi wo xavisa ni ku endla vutshila. Mbewu leyi hlayisiweke leyi seleke a yi vula leswaku vaaki va nga hanya malembe ya ku oma va tlhela va seketela varhangeri ni vatshila.

slides.eyebrow: Ku xavisa nsuku ni marhomu ya ndlopfu
slides.heading: Ku xavisa ni matiko ya kule
slides.lead: Mapungubwe a wu xavisa nsuku ni marhomu ya ndlopfu naswona wu xava swilo swo saseka ku suka etlhelo hi lwandle.

blocks.text: Vaxavisi a va rhwala **nsuku ni marhomu ya ndlopfu** (marhomu ya tindlopfu) ku suka eMapungubwe va ya emachubeni ya le vuxeni bya Afrika. Ku suka kwalaho swilo swi fambe hi xikepe swi ya eka matiko ya kule. Etshamelweni sweswo, Mapungubwe a wu amukela vurhulana bya ngilazi, nguvu ni swuma swin'wana.

items: Mapungubwe a wu xavisa ni tindhawu to fana na China, India na Arabia leti a ti ri kule swinene.
Nsuku ni marhomu a swi humesiwa; vurhulana bya ngilazi ni nguvu swi nghenile.
Leswi swi endla Mapungubwe wu va xiphemu xa mabindzu ya misava kwalomu ka malembe ya 800 lama hundzeke.

image.alt: Rhomu ra ndlopfu ni switlhangu swa nsuku etlhelo rin'we na nkholo wa vurhulana bya ngilazi etlhelo rin'wana, swi hlanganisiwa hi mikwana.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 160' role='img'><rect width='260' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M28 96 q30 -34 60 -8 q-24 8 -60 8 Z' fill='#efe7d2' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='40' cy='118' r='8' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='56' cy='124' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M104 78 h52 M104 92 h52' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' marker-end='url(#a)'/><g><line x1='104' y1='78' x2='150' y2='78' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M150 72 l12 6 l-12 6 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><line x1='156' y1='92' x2='110' y2='92' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M110 86 l-12 6 l12 6 Z' fill='#2f5233'/></g><g fill='#3f6bb0'><circle cx='196' cy='96' r='7'/><circle cx='212' cy='104' r='7'/><circle cx='228' cy='96' r='7'/><circle cx='220' cy='84' r='7'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela leswaku rhomu ra ndlopfu i yini (rhomu ra ndlopfu) naswona vula hi vukhwetlembetani leswaku ku xavisa marhomu swi vavisile tindlopfu - i vuhlanganisi lebyinene ni Life Skills. Mhaka leyikulu: vanhu va Afrika laha a va nga hambananga ni misava; a va ri vaxavisi lava tirhaka eka mabindzu lama fikaka eAsia. [SME] Ndza kombela mi tiyisisa nxaxamelo lowu kongomeke wa vanghana va mabindzu ni machubu eka marito ya Grade 6; xihlovo xi vula China, India, Egypt na Arabia ku tlula machubu ya le vuxeni bya Afrika.

slides.heading: Mhelembe wa nsuku
slides.lead: Xilo lexi tiviwaka swinene xa le Mapungubwe i mhelembe lowutsongo lowu funengeteriweke hi nsuku.

blocks.text: Va arkiyoloji va kume **mhelembe wo endliwa hi nsuku wo tsana** lowu vumbiweke ehenhla ka xisati xa nhunti. Wu kumiwe esirheni ra vuhosi ehenhla ka ntshava. Mhelembe wa nsuku wu komba vutshila bya vaendli va nsuku va le Mapungubwe, naswona sweswi i xikombiso xo tinyungubyisa xa matimu yo enta ya Afrika-Dzonga.
Mhelembe wa nsuku wu hi byela leswaku vanhu va Afrika laha a va endla swiendliwa swo saseka swa nsuku madzana ya malembe lama hundzeke.

items: Wu lahliwe ni hosi kumbe murhangeri wa nkoka.
Swiendliwa swa nsuku swo fana na lexi swi kombise matimba ni rifuwo ra vuhosi.
Xichaviso lexikulu swinene xa rixaka xa Afrika-Dzonga xi thyiwe vito ra Order of Mapungubwe.

image.alt: Xifaniso xitsongo xa mhelembe wa nsuku lowu nga na rhomu rin'we, lowu yimeke ehenhla ka xisekelo.

slides.notes: Mhelembe wa nsuku i ntlhandlo wa mintlhaveko wa dyondzo - xilo xa xiviri lexi swichudeni swi nga xi anakanyaka. Hlayisa swi olova: nsuku wo tsana ehenhla ka xisati lexi vatliweke. [SME] Tiyisisa leswaku hi xihi xifaniso xin'we lexi mi lavaka ku xi veka emahlweni (mhelembe wo dumaka) ku ringana ni ntlawa lowukulu wa nsuku, ni ndhawu ya sweswi ya muziyamu (University of Pretoria) loku mi lava ku wu thya vito. Papalata ku hetisisa ntikelo hi ku kongoma eka Grade 6.

slides.heading: I mani a tshama kwihi
slides.lead: Mapungubwe a wu ri yin'wana wa tindhawu to sungula endhawini leyi laha varhangeri a va tshama va hambanile ni vanhu van'wana hinkwavo.

items: Hosi ni ndyangu wa vuhosi.
Va hambanisiwile ku komba leswaku a va hlawulekile.
Va lahliwe ni nsuku loko va lova.
Vanhu vo tala vo tolovela: varimi, varisi ni vatshila.
A va tshama etindlwini leti rhendzelekaka ekusuhi ni masimu ya vona.
Va lahliwe handle ka swuma swa nsuku.

slides.notes: Xitshateli lexi xi thya vito xivumbeko xa vanhu hi ku kongoma. Tirhisa marito 'ntlawa' kumbe 'xiyimo' hi vukheta eka Grade 6: van'wana a va ri na matimba ni rifuwo ku tlula van'wana, naswona a swi vonaka eka laha a va tshama kona. Fambisa hi xichavo - papalata ku vula leswaku vanhu vo tolovela a va nga na nkoka; hi vona lava rimeke swakudya va tlhela va endla swilo leswi endleke mfumo wu fuwa.

slides.heading: Ku kuma Mapungubwe nakambe
slides.lead: Ntsheketelo wa Mapungubwe wu byariwe hi misava hi yoxe - hi ku tirhisa leswi vanhu va swi celeke.

blocks.text: Vanhu va laha kaya a va tiva minkarhi hinkwayo leswaku ntshava wu hlawulekile. Hi **1932** ntlawa lowu rhangeriweke ku ya ehenhla ka ntshava wu kume marhangu ya maribye, swibya, vurhulana bya ngilazi ni nsuku. Ku sukela nkarhi wolowo, **va arkiyoloji** (vativi lava dyondzaka hi khale hi ku cela) va paluxile hi vukheta masirha, tindlu ni swilo leswi hi dyondzisaka ndlela leyi vanhu a va hanya ha yona.

items: Hi dyondza hi Mapungubwe hi ku tirhisa swilo, ku nga ri tibuku leti tsariweke.
Vurhulana ni swibya swi komba mabindzu ni vutomi bya siku ni siku.
Masirha ma komba leswaku i mani a fuwe, a na matimba kumbe a toloveleke.

image.alt: Mavoko ni xikombiso swi paluxa swibya ni vurhulana leswi lahliweke emisaveni.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='84' width='240' height='76' fill='#c8934a'/><path d='M60 128 q22 -22 48 0 Z' fill='#8a5a34'/><g fill='#3f6bb0'><circle cx='150' cy='120' r='5'/><circle cx='164' cy='126' r='5'/><circle cx='178' cy='120' r='5'/></g><rect x='150' y='60' width='40' height='8' rx='4' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(-20 170 64)'/><rect x='182' y='44' width='10' height='24' rx='3' fill='#d8c8a8' transform='rotate(-20 187 56)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nghenisa mianakanyo ya arkiyoloji ni vumbhoni - swa nkoka eka nkongomelo wa CAPS wa 'ndlela leyi hi swi tivaka ha yona hi khale'. Vula hi vukheta leswaku hambileswi 1932 wu vuriwaka 'ku kumeka', vanhu lava a va tshama ekusuhi a va tiva khale leswaku ntshava wu ri wo kwetsima; swilo a swi ri swintshwa eka vativi, ku nga ri eka vaaki va kwalaho. [SME] Tiyisisa vukhwetlembetani bya mavito lebyi mi byi lavaka mayelana ni ku kumeka ka 1932 eka Grade 6.

slides.heading: Ntsheketelo wa Mapungubwe

blocks.alt: Xikombiso xa minkarhi ku sukela kwalomu ka 1100 ku ya namuntlha lexi kombaka ku tlakuka, ku fika ehenhla, ku wa ni ku amukeriwa ka Mapungubwe endzhaku.

events.label: Vanhu va aka eNkoveni wa Limpopo
Mapungubwe wu va mfumo lowu fuweke; hosi yi rhurha yi ya ehenhla ka ntshava
Mabindzu lama tirhaka ya nsuku ni marhomu ya ndlopfu ni matiko ya kule
Mfumo wu wa naswona vanhu va rhurha
Nsuku ni swilo swin'wana swi kumiwa hi va arkiyoloji
Wu thyiwa vito ra UNESCO World Heritage Site

slides.notes: Tirhisa xikombiso xa minkarhi ku hlanganisa nxaxamelo: ku tlakuka, ku fika ehenhla, ku wa, kutani ku kumeka nakambe endzhaku ka nkarhi wo leha. Malembe i ya kwalomu ('c.' yi vula 'kwalomu ka') hikuva a ku ri na matsalwa. Kombela swichudeni swi vona leswaku i malembe manani lawa mfumo a wu ri na matimba (kwalomu ka malembe ya 80-100 hi nkarhi wa kona wa ehenhla). [SME] Tiyisisa lembe ra xiviri ra UNESCO (hakanyingi ri nyikiwa tanihi 2003).

slides.heading: Ha yini Mapungubwe wu wile?
slides.lead: Endzhaku ka kwalomu ka 1300 mfumo wu lahlekeriwe hi matimba naswona vanhu vo tala va rhurhile.

blocks.text: Kwalomu ka 1300 maxelo ma vonaka ma sungurile ku va **ni titimela ni ku oma**. Mpfula leyi tsaneke yi endle swi va tika ku rima swirimiwa ni ku hlayisa tihomu ta vanhu vo tala endhawini yin'we. Mabindzu na wona ma sungurile ku rhurhela endhawini leyintshwa, **Great Zimbabwe**, ehenhla n'walungwini.

items: Maxelo yo oma ma endle vurimi ni ku risa swi tika.
Vanhu va rhurhile va ya lava misava ni mati lamanene.
Great Zimbabwe wu kurile wu va mfumo lowu landzelaka wa mabindzu lowukulu.

image.alt: Nsimu wo oma lowu tshovekeke na dyambu ro hisa ni murhi wo pfumala matluka, swi komba dyandza.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='196' cy='40' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#cbb27e'/><path d='M40 130 l20 -6 M100 140 l24 -4 M150 126 l26 6 M60 150 l30 -2' stroke='#9a8250' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><path d='M60 108 v-30 q-14 -4 -18 -16 q16 6 18 8 q2 -14 -6 -22 q14 6 14 20 q6 -10 18 -12 q-8 12 -18 18 v34 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nyika swivangelo swimbirhi leswikulu leswi vativi va swi bulaka: ku cinca ka maxelo (ku oma, titimela) ni ku rhurhela ka mabindzu eGreat Zimbabwe. Va na vutshembeki eka Grade 6 leswaku a hi tiyisekanga swinene - leswi swi dyondzisa leswaku matimu manghana ma na mimhaka yo hlaya ya ku hlamusela. Hlanganisa emahlweni: Great Zimbabwe i mfumo lowu landzelaka lowu swichudeni hakanyingi swi wu dyondzaka.

slides.eyebrow: Ha yini swi ri na nkoka namuntlha
slides.heading: Ndzhaka yo tinyungubyisa ya Afrika
slides.lead: Mapungubwe wu hi tsundzuxa leswaku vanhu va Afrika va akile mimfumo yo fuwa, ya vutlhari khale.

blocks.text: Nkarhi wo leha van'wana va vulile hi vuxisi leswaku Afrika a yi na mimfumo yayona leyikulu. Mapungubwe wu kombisa leswaku sweswo a hi ntiyiso. Namuntlha i **World Heritage Site** leyi sireleriweke ya vanhu hinkwavo, naswona xichaviso xa le henhla swinene xa Afrika-Dzonga, **Order of Mapungubwe**, xi thyiwe vito ra wona.

items: Wu komba vutshila bya Afrika eka nsuku, vurimi ni mabindzu.
Wu sireleriwile leswaku swichudeni swa nkarhi lowu taka na swona swi ta wu dyondza.
Wu nyika vanhu va Afrika-Dzonga matimu yo tinyungubyisa, lama avelanaka.

image.alt: Ribindzu ra medlheye ya nsuku ni xifaniso xa mhelembe lexitsongo, ekusuhi ni xitlangi xa ndhawu leyi sireleriweke.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M70 40 l18 40 h-36 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='70' cy='96' r='26' fill='#e8a13a' stroke='#c8871f' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M58 100 q6 -12 24 -8 q-4 8 -24 8 Z' fill='#a8762f'/><g><rect x='140' y='48' width='70' height='80' rx='6' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M175 60 l24 12 v18 q0 20 -24 30 q-24 -10 -24 -30 v-18 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='175' cy='92' r='9' fill='#7a8b5a'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hetelela dyondzo hi ku tinyungubyisa ni xichavo. Kandziyisa mhaka yo lwisana ni xihlawuhlawu hi vukheta eka Grade 6: Mapungubwe i vumbhoni bya leswaku vanhu va le Afrika-Dzonga va akile miganga ya nhluvuko khale swinene ku nga si fika vamatiko-mbe va Yuropa. Hlanganisa ni ndzhaka leyi swichudeni swi nga yi tivaka - World Heritage Sites, swichaviso swa rixaka.

slides.heading: Leswi hi swi dyondzeke
slides.lead: Mapungubwe a wu ri mfumo wo sungula wa le Afrika-Dzonga - wu fuwe hi vurimi, tihomu ni ku xavisa nsuku na marhomu ya ndlopfu, naswona wu fumiwa hi hosi ehenhla ka ntshava.

blocks.text: Tsundzuka mianakanyo leyikulu: **kwihi** (Nkoveni wa Limpopo), **rini** (kwalomu ka 1220-1300), **rifuwo** (mabindzu ya nsuku ni marhomu ya ndlopfu), **mhelembe wa nsuku**, **hosi ehenhla ka ntshava** ehenhla ka vanhu vo tolovela, ni **ku wa** loko maxelo ma oma naswona mabindzu ma rhurhela eGreat Zimbabwe.

blocks.question: Boxa swilo swimbirhi leswi Mapungubwe a wu swi xavisa ni matiko ya kule, ni xilo xin'we lexi wu xi amukeleke etshamelweni sweswo.
Ha yini hosi ni ndyangu wa vuhosi a va tshama ehenhla ka ntshava? Xana leswi a swi kombisa yini ha vona?
Nyika xivangelo xin'we lexi va matimu va anakanyaka leswaku Mapungubwe wu wile hi xona endzhaku ka kwalomu ka 1300.

slides.notes: Tirhisa swivutiso swinharhu tanihi ntirho wo tsariwa kumbe mbulavurisano wa tlilasi. Ku averiwa ka maka ku landzela mifambiselo ya CAPS Intermediate Phase. Khutaza swichudeni ku hlamula hi swivulwa leswi heleleke ni ku tirhisa marito ya dyondzo: mfumo, mabindzu, marhomu ya ndlopfu, muarkiyoloji, vuhosi, ku wa. Hetelela hi ku hlanganisa ni nhloko-mhaka leyi landzelaka, Great Zimbabwe.
